name: Midnight Truffle Risotto
description: Creamy arborio rice with black truffle shavings, parmesan, and a drizzle of truffle oil.

name: Ember Grilled Ribeye
description: 16oz prime ribeye, charred over open flame, served with roasted garlic butter.

name: Owl's Nest Salad
description: Mixed greens, candied walnuts, blue cheese, and honey-balsamic vinaigrette.

name: Smoked Salmon Tartare
description: Hand-cut smoked salmon with capers, shallots, and lemon crème fraîche.

name: Candlelit Crème Brûlée
description: Classic vanilla bean custard with a crackling caramelized sugar top.

name: Dark Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Rich molten chocolate center, served with vanilla bean ice cream.

name: Twilight Old Fashioned
description: Bourbon, bitters, orange peel, and a smoked cherry garnish.

name: Moonlit Espresso Martini
description: Fresh espresso, vodka, Kahlúa, shaken to perfection.

name: Night Owl Wings
description: Crispy chicken wings glazed with spicy honey-sriracha sauce.

name: Starlit Lobster Bisque
description: Rich and velvety lobster bisque finished with brandy cream.
